tipRules.tip: Wheeler: Self-described buzzbait fanatic; considers it one of his two favorite lures to fish.
Wheeler: Says it's hard to beat a Rapala DT-6 just about anywhere you go.
Wheeler: In late February/early March, loves fishing bass grouped up in underwater ditches 30-40 feet deep at Lake Hartwell with an underspin spinner or small swimbait on 10-lb Sufix fluorocarbon.

knowledge.insight: Wheeler: In late February/early March, bass group up in underwater ditches 30-40 feet deep; targets them with underspin or small swimbait on light fluorocarbon.
